# ZEBRA - E-Invoice Anonymizer
> Privacy-focused, 100% client-side web application for anonymizing ZUGFeRD and XRechnung e-invoices securely in the browser.

## Overview
ZEBRA is designed to strip sensitive personal and business information from electronic invoice data while preserving the structural integrity of the document for testing, development, or sharing. 

It processes both standalone `.xml` files (ZUGFeRD/XRechnung) and Hybrid-PDFs (`.pdf` containing embedded XML).

## Core Features
- **Client-Side Processing:** All parsing and anonymization happen entirely in the client browser. No invoice files or data are uploaded to any server.
- **Smart Anonymization:** Substitutes name, address, ID, and contact details with randomized, case- and type-preserving data.
- **Format Support:** Extraction of embedded XML from Hybrid-PDFs using PDF.js and standard XML anonymization.
- **PWA Ready:** Available for offline use as a Progressive Web App.
- **Multi-language Support (i18n):** User interface localized in English, German, and French.

## Technical Details
- **Tech Stack:** Vite, TypeScript, Vanilla CSS, PDF.js (for hybrid PDFs).
- **Anonymization Rules:**
  - **Whitelisted tags (preserved):** Elements ending with `code`, `date`, `time`, `amount`, `percent`, `tax`, `currency`, `indicator`.
  - **Blacklisted tags (anonymized):** Elements ending with `name`, `street`, `city`, `lineone`, `linetwo`, `person`, `contact`, `telephone`, `telefax`, `mail`, `note`, `description`, `content`.
  - **Forced tags (always anonymized):** `ibanid`, `postcodecode`, `globalid`, `completenumber`, `uriid`, `id`, `sellerassignedid`.
  - **Attachments:** Embedded objects (`attachmentbinaryobject`, `embeddeddocumentbinaryobject`) are cleared or replaced with dummy content.

## Links & Resources
- [ZEBRA Web Application](https://zebra.valitool.org/) - Main application page.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/valitoolorg/zebra) - Source code and issue tracker.
- [Sitemap](https://zebra.valitool.org/sitemap.xml) - Site URL index.
- [robots.txt](https://zebra.valitool.org/robots.txt) - Web crawler instructions.
